The '''Managing Council''', was the legislature of the [[Outbound Flight Colony]]. The Council, by the requirement of its founding mandate, consisted of member-representatives from its two factions: the [[Survivors (Outbound Flight)|Survivors]] and the [[Colonists]]. It shared power with the Colony's [[Director/Legends|Director]], and both worked together to set policy.<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />

[[Brace Tarkosa]] and [[Jobe Keely]] represented Survivors on the Council. They met in the [[Council Meeting Chamber]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
